text: The exterior view through the glass feels like a barrier between the world outside and the tightly constructed environment within. As I step inside and confront the bright, immersive R+D display, I am struck by the strangely electric intimacy and almost clinical atmosphere. Reading the words on the screen, I feel a resonance with the sense of being exposed and misunderstood. My own presence here suddenly feels both glaring and insubstantial, my mind lingering on themes of perception, identity, and the invisible lines that separate intention from interpretation.
